# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The following versions are currently supported with security updates:

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| latest  | ✅        |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please report it responsibly.

Please do not open a public issue.

Instead, contact:

<support@imgil.dev>

You can also use GitHub Security Advisories if available.

## Response Process

Security reports are reviewed as quickly as possible.

After confirmation:

- A fix will be prepared
- A patched release will be published
- A security advisory may be issued if necessary
